caption:
You didn't hire a bad closer.

You built a slow follow-up system and blamed the person answering the phone for it.

A lead who waits has often already talked to a competitor by the time your rep calls back. The script never mattered. The clock did.

Pull your last 20 leads. Check the timestamp between lead and first response, not the call recording.

Industry research on lead response time shows responding within 5 minutes can double your close rate compared to slower callbacks.

DM SCALE

#SalesStrategy #LeadResponse #BusinessGrowth #SalesSystems #BlackArrow
rationale: Reels reward sharp, share-worthy points of view right now (DM sends are Instagram's top 2026 ranking signal), and this reframes a conversion problem owners usually blame on staff as a systems problem instead, a fresh contrarian angle this account hasn't run.
